title: OmniWound Monthly Pulse - April 2026
excerpt: Issue #2 covers three major topics: (1) The CMS 2026 skin substitute reimbursement overhaul that replaced individual biologic codes with a flat ~$127/cm2 incident-to supply rate effective January 1, 2026 (source: thewca.com); (2) New research showing integrated care bundles cut mean healing time from 25.5 to 12.7 weeks and reduced wound infection rates by 84.3% (source: sciencedirect.com); and (3) SAWC Spring 2026 running April 8-12 in Charlotte, NC (source: hmpglobalevents.com). Clinical tip covers evidence-based biofilm detection and management. EMR spotlight features wound measurement tracking with photos, framed around the documentation requirements under the new CMS 2026 framework.

title: OmniWound Monthly Pulse — Issue #1
excerpt: Welcome to the first issue! Learn about default values to speed up documentation, major Medicare cost controls on wound care products, and SNF rate increases.
